templates.name: Why does your advertising say “each piece” for mattress pricing?
templates.content:
Our mattresses and box springs can be bought individually or sold in sets. Mattress and box spring sets include a discount when purchased together.

Each mattress and box spring is considered one piece each. This means that a twin, full, and Queen mattress would come with two pieces: the mattress as one piece, and the box spring as the second piece. Our King mattress sets have three pieces: a mattress and a split box spring, which includes two pieces.

templates.name: Do you dispose of my old appliances? Haul away
templates.content:
If your item is eligible for installation or hook-up, your old item may be eligible for haul away.
You'll find information on what items are eligible here: https://www.americanfreight.com/br/c/shipping-delivery

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Question about same or next day delivery
templates.content: Same day delivery is limited to certain areas and is only an option when you purchase before 12pm local time and when space is available on the local store's delivery truck. Items requiring licensed installation aren't available for same day service. If your item is available, the options will appear in the checkout process. Keep in mind, same day and next day delivery will result in an additional fee that will also be shown at checkout.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: We offer several different options to receive your products. Many of our items are available for delivery. Pricing and delivery time will depend on where your item is located around the country. We offer both local and national delivery options. Smaller, lighter weight items may be eligible for shipping via UPS. Pricing and shipping time will depend on factors such as item location, size, weight, and availability. You can read more about our shipping and delivery services here: https://www.americanfreight.com/br/c/shipping-delivery

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to contact us directly via this link https://www.americanfreight.com/sp/contact-us/ Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: What is “factory select” furniture?
templates.content: Factory Select furniture is an overstock of furniture that is crafted in randomly selected fabrics and colors. Quantities, fabrics, and colors vary by location, please see your local store for details. When inventory is gone, it is gone. Specific items, colors, and fabrics cannot be special ordered for Factory Select furniture.

templates.name: Do delivery teams assemble my furniture?
templates.content: Delivery teams will install legs onto sofas, loveseats, and sectionals as some require special tools. Most of the delivery teams do not assemble boxed goods.; however, some may do so for an additional fee. Your local store will be able to tell you whether or not the available delivery services offer additional assembly services.

templates.name: Your prices are so low – what’s the catch?
templates.content: We are able to keep our prices low by operating differently than other furniture and appliance stores. First, we obtain our merchandise directly from manufacturers through closeouts, overruns, and cancelled orders at reduced prices. Additionally, we display these products in warehouses instead of fancy showrooms in order to reduce our overhead costs. By combining these savings with what we save from our direct manufacturers, we're able to pass these huge savings on to you as a thank you for being our customer.

templates.name: Why shipping is not available at my location?
templates.content: Please note that not all store locations offer Local Delivery online. Your item(s) qualify for local delivery if they are located within 75 miles of your delivery address. If Local Delivery is not available during checkout, complete your order and call your local store to get an estimate and schedule Local Delivery as these locations utilize third-party (sub-contracted) delivery services.
